raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un wiꞥſch eezeble Kaṙra
Ahwerſtus pahr teem Laudim/
un ſapulzinaja tohſ pee tewim
tai Eeleiſâ pee Pilſfahta Wahr-
tin/ un eerunnaja teem Širdi/
un ſazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Effekt ſtipri/ un nemmee-
tees drohſchu Prahtu/ ne bihſtee-
tees/ un ne iſbaillojeetees preekſch
to Affiren Kehnizu/nedſ preekſch
wiſſeem winna Pulkeem/ kaſ
pee winna irr/ jo pee mumſ irr
weens leelakajs/ ne ka pee winna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Ar winnu irr weens mee-
sigſ Elkons/ bet ar mumſ irr
tas KUNGGS muhſu Deewſ/
ka taſmmms palihds/ un preekſch
mums farro. Un tee Laudis
patahwahs us Iſkijus ta Ach-
nira no Juhda Wahrdcem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Pehz to fuhttia Saneribs
tas Kehninsch no Affirijas ſawus
Kalpus us Jeruſalemi/ (bet
wiſſch pats bija preekſch Lakifu/
un wiſſi winna Walditaji ar to)
pee Iſkiju to Kehnizu no Juh-
da/ un pee wiſſu Juhdu/ kaſ Je-
rusaleniê bija/ un likke fazzibt:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Ta ſakke Saneribs tas
Kehninsch no Affirijas: Us ko
juhs paſanjatees/ ka juhs Jeru-
saleme paleekat/ kaſ apſehſta
kuhs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Negg Iſkijus juhs pahr-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Woj ſchis ne irr tas Iſ-
kijus/ kaſ winna Augſtumuſ un
winna Altarus irr nopohſtijs/
un us Juhdu un Jeruſalemi run-
najs un fazztis: Preekſch weena
Altara buhſ jums peeluhtagt/ un
us to kwehpinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Ar juhs ne finnat/ ko eſ
un manni Tehwi wiſſeem Pa-
ſaules Laudim effim darriſchi?
Warreja arridsan tee Deewi to
Tanto tahs Paſaules ſawas
Gemmes no mannas Rohkas
iſglahbt?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Kurſch irr no wiſſeem
Deeweem to patchu Tantu/ ko
manni Tehwi iſdeldeſchi/ kaſ
warrejis ſawus Laudis no man-
nas Rohkas iſglahbt? ka juhsu
Deewam juhs bij no mannas
Rohkas iſglahbt?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Nu tad/ lat Iſkijus juhs
ne peewit/ un ne leezeetees ta
pahrrunnatees/ un ne tizzett win-
nam. Jo ja ne lahds Deewṣ
wiſſu Tantu un Walsibu ſawus
Laudis warrejs no mannas Roh-
kas/ un no manni Tehwu Roh-
kas iſglahbt/ jo masaki juhtu
Deewṣ warrehs juhs no man-
nas Rohkas iſglahbt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un winna Kalpirunnaja
wehl wairak prett Deewu to
KUNGU/ un prett Iſkiju win-
na Kalpu.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
